text: - 4.9 MOCK UPS: Subcontractor will participate in field mockups where the intent is to eliminate conflicts and establish an acceptable level of finish and quality for the project. Typical mockups will include but are not limited to the following: unit mock up, exterior facade mockup. Mockups will be full scale and be completed 100%. Subcontractor acknowledges and agrees that the Contract Sum includes costs associated with minor refurbishment of unit finishes prior to turnover.
